name: Chocolate Ice Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ingredients in a bowl and beat for 4 minutes.
2. Pour the batter into a well-greased and floured 12-cup, 10-inch Bundt pan.
3. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
4. Allow the cooled cake to be frosted with coconut fudge frosting or glazed with chocolate icing.
Unusual Old World and American Recipes from Nordic Ware.
